title: [FIRRTL] InferResets failing to update types of extmodules
body:
InferTesets should be updating the reset type on external modules.

`firtool ./infer.fir`
```
circuit bar:
  extmodule X:
    input reset : Reset

  module bar:
    inst x of X
    x.reset <= UInt<1>("h1")
 ```

```
/work/aryoung/infer.fir:10:5: error: 'firrtl.instance' op result type for "reset" must be '!firrtl.reset', but got '!firrtl.uint<1>'
    inst x of X
    ^
/work/aryoung/infer.fir:10:5: note: see current operation: %0 = "firrtl.instance"() {annotations = [], lowerToBind = false, moduleName = @X, name = "x", portAnnotations = [[]]} : () -> !firrtl.uint<1>
/work/aryoung/infer.fir:6:13: note: original module declared here
  extmodule X:
```
